name: NIMCP_Brain_Immune_System
observations: Biologically-inspired immune coordination layer (B cells, T cells, antibodies, cytokines)
Added bio-async integration to 24+ immune bridge modules (Dec 2024)
Added BIO_MODULE_* definitions for all immune bridges (0x0D00 - 0x0DFF range)
Fixed logging macros from nimcp_log to NIMCP_LOGGING_* and LOG_MODULE_*
Fixed time function calls to nimcp_time_get_ms/us
All 47 brain immune unit tests passing
Integration with BBB, BFT, swarm immune subsystems

name: NIMCP_Bio_Async_Integration
observations: Bio-async router provides inter-module messaging
Each immune bridge registers with bio_router_register_module()
Uses BIO_MODULE_* identifiers from nimcp_bio_messages.h
Standard API: connect_bio_async, disconnect_bio_async, is_bio_async_connected
Struct fields: bio_module_context_t bio_ctx, bool bio_async_enabled

name: NIMCP_Phase_1_1_Medulla
observations: Implemented Dec 2025
5 modules: arousal_state, protective_cutoff, brainstem_coupling, circadian, medulla orchestrator
~5981 lines of production code
Bio-async integration for all modules
Models brainstem autonomic functions

name: nimcp_arousal_state
observations: Models reticular activating system (RAS)
9 arousal states from COMA to PANIC
Hysteresis prevents oscillation
Rate-limiting for smooth transitions

name: nimcp_circadian
observations: Models suprachiasmatic nucleus (SCN)
8 circadian phases (3 hours each)
Two-process sleep model (Process S + Process C)
Zeitgeber entrainment (light, activity, social)

name: nimcp_protective_cutoff
observations: Models vasovagal/pain withdrawal reflexes
6 protection levels from NORMAL to EMERGENCY_SHUTDOWN
8 threat types with weighted assessment
Capability matrix restricts operations per level

name: nimcp_brainstem_coupling
observations: Models ascending reticular activating system (ARAS)
Bottom-up: arousal, threat, metabolic, circadian signals
Top-down: attention modulation, executive override, voluntary control
Biological latencies: threat 35ms, arousal 75ms, metabolic 1000ms, circadian 30000ms

name: nimcp_medulla_orchestrator
observations: Main coordination module for medulla subsystem
Integrates: health_monitor, recovery, sleep-wake, neuromodulators
Coordination pipeline: circadian -> protection -> arousal -> neuromod -> sleep-wake
Emergency shutdown triggers automatic recovery
